ranking_rationale: cbrt=highest-complexity polynomial approx with vConstFloatPrgm coefficients and fp32/fp16b mode branching (closest structural match for Stirling series); cosh=composite multi-term formula combining SFPU primitives (models lgamma Stirling accumulation); selu=piecewise v_if conditional with exp+constant multiply (models reflection formula for x<0); hardsigmoid=piecewise conditionals with SFPU_OP_HARDSIGMOID_INCLUDE macro and clean no-param init path; hardtanh=runtime float params via uint32_t bitcast and SFPU_OP_HARDTANH_INCLUDE macro (models any optional boundary-constant handling)
